context_notes: All 9 phases real + committed. First independent code review RAN this session (2026-06-28) across all 9 phases, then all 4 critical + 32 warning findings were auto-fixed (32 fix commits, +44 regression tests). Tests now 438 pass here (kp 268 / workers 125 / web 45 + tsc + build). The cross-cutting marquee fix made the eval/attribution gate STRUCTURAL (Fragment fields private, apply()/place_sampled() sole mutators) instead of convention — but, like all Rust/ML/LLM fixes, it is applied-by-reading and ENV-GATED until compiled on a capable machine. Honesty rule still holds: distinguish 'tests ran' (Python/web) from 'reviewed + fixed + env-gated' (Rust/ML/LLM).
